leadText: Water Pulse (Japanese: みずのはどう Water Pulse) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM03 in Generations III and IV and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM011 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM041 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Water Pulse inflicts damage and has a 20% chance of confusing the target. It can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Water Pulse's power is increased by 50% when used by Pokémon with the Ability Mega Launcher . Water Pulse can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 3 bonus appeal points if Rain Dance was used in the previous turn. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Water Pulse cannot confuse the target. Instead, it bypasses accuracy and evasion checks to always hit. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Attacks with ultrasonic waves. May confuse the foe. R S E (move) Attacks with ultrasonic waves. May confuse target. Colo XD (move) Generates an ultrasonic wave that may confuse. (TM) FR LG An attack with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe. D P Pt HG SS The user attacks the foe with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe. (move) The foe is hit with a pulsating blast of water. It may also confuse the target. (TM) PBR The user attacks the foe with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe. B W B2 W2 The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the target. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target. LA The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This attack never misses. ZA The user attacks by shooting a pulsing blast of water. This may also leave targets confused.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also leave the target confused. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also afflict the target with a Confused status. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで こんらんじょうたいにかえる Conq. A pulse of water is ejected at the target, confusing them. MD GtI It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It could also cause the Confused status condition. The Confused status impairs its sense of direction. S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It could also make the enemy confused.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] From Generation III onwards, Secret Power has the animation of Water Pulse if used on water . Water Pulse is the only Water-type move capable of inflicting confusion.
